default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Turnstile content feedback and align on a path forward.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Turnstile content consistently misses the client's POV, not just having accuracy issues. This requires a strategic fix, not just tactical edits.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pause production to "slow down to speed up." The immediate goal is to define the client's POV in a shared doc for their validation.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Long-Term Fix:** Once the POV is validated, create a "Turnstile Positioning Checker" step in the Atlas pipeline to hardcode their perspective and prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** William will review all 9 articles and artifacts to provide a fresh perspective, while Ifeoluwa will consolidate all feedback into a single doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Content Misses Turnstile's POV

  - [Turnstile's feedback, especially from Seema and Jordan, is highly specific to their perspective, not just grammar or accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [This indicates a systemic issue with understanding their core POV, not a simple pipeline error.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**Example Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - ["This is not our perspective."](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - ["We are sacrificing depth for brevity."](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - ["We are missing key distinctions and information."](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The initial kickoff and product deep dive did not fully capture the client's nuanced perspective.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)

### Solution: Define & Validate POV

  - [**Strategy:** Pause production to focus entirely on defining the client's POV.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
    1.  [**Consolidate Feedback:** Ifeoluwa will create a shared Google Doc with all feedback from the 9 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
    2.  [**Analyze & Synthesize:** William will review all content and artifacts, then synthesize the client's POV into the shared doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
    3.  **Client Validation:** Send the POV doc to Turnstile for review by EOD today.
          - [**Goal:** Get explicit confirmation and push for more details to ensure a complete understanding.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)

### Long-Term Fix: "Turnstile Positioning Checker"

  - [**Plan:** Once the POV is validated, create a new step in the Atlas pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Step Name:** "Turnstile Positioning Checker"](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [**Function:** This step will validate generated content against the client's specific POV before SEO meta-tag generation.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [**Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
    1.  [**Test in Claude:** First, prototype the checker's logic using Claude to ensure it works.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
    2.  [**Propose to Engineering:** If successful, propose adding the step to the Atlas pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ifeoluwa:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
      - [Create a shared Google Doc to consolidate all Turnstile feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [Share the "core to cash" CPQ article and related artifacts with William.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
      - [Review all 9 Turnstile articles and artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Synthesize the client's POV into the shared doc.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
      - [Review the "Quote to Cash" meeting recording for additional context.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
      - [Send the consolidated POV doc to Turnstile for validation by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/MX5bemMBZwwXygxXKGWXsNQwzeAZ2Q7u?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
